mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM coupon_issue WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND status = '발급'

SELECT oi.order_item_no AS orderItemNo, oi.order_no AS orderNo, oi.delivery_no AS deliveryNo, oi.product_no AS productNo, oi.seller_no AS sellerNo, oi.product_name AS productName, oi.product_image AS productImage, oi.price AS price, oi.discount_rate AS discountRate, oi.coupon_discount AS couponDiscount, oi.point AS point, oi.quantity AS quantity, oi.total_price AS totalPrice, oi.item_status AS itemStatus, oi.purchase_confirm_date AS purchaseConfirmDate,
o.order_code AS orderCode, o.order_date AS orderDate,
sp.company_name AS companyName,
d.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus,
pr.review_no AS reviewNo
FROM orders o
INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_no = oi.order_no
INNER JOIN seller_profile sp ON oi.seller_no = sp.seller_no
LEFT JOIN delivery d ON oi.delivery_no = d.delivery_no
LEFT JOIN product_review pr ON oi.order_item_no = pr.order_item_no
WHERE o.member_no = #{memberNo}
ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{size}
LIMIT 5

SELECT oi.order_item_no AS orderItemNo, oi.order_no AS orderNo, oi.delivery_no AS deliveryNo, oi.product_no AS productNo, oi.seller_no AS sellerNo, oi.product_name AS productName, oi.product_image AS productImage, oi.price AS price, oi.discount_rate AS discountRate, oi.coupon_discount AS couponDiscount, oi.point AS point, oi.quantity AS quantity, oi.total_price AS totalPrice, oi.item_status AS itemStatus, oi.purchase_confirm_date AS purchaseConfirmDate,
o.order_code AS orderCode, o.order_date AS orderDate,
sp.company_name AS companyName,
d.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus,
pr.review_no AS reviewNo
FROM orders o
INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_no = oi.order_no
INNER JOIN seller_profile sp ON oi.seller_no = sp.seller_no
LEFT JOIN delivery d ON oi.delivery_no = d.delivery_no
LEFT JOIN product_review pr ON oi.order_item_no = pr.order_item_no
WHERE o.member_no = #{memberNo}
AND DATE(o.order_date) >= #{startDate}
AND DATE(o.order_date) <= #{endDate}
ORDER BY o.order_date DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{size}

SELECT o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_code AS orderCode, o.order_date AS orderDate,
oi.order_item_no AS orderItemNo, oi.product_no AS productNo, oi.seller_no AS sellerNo, oi.product_name AS productName, oi.product_image AS productImage, oi.price AS price, oi.discount_rate AS discountRate, oi.coupon_discount AS couponDiscount, oi.quantity AS quantity, oi.total_price AS totalPrice, oi.item_status AS itemStatus, oi.purchase_confirm_date AS purchaseConfirmDate,
sp.company_name AS companyName,
d.receiver_name AS receiverName, d.receiver_hp AS receiverHp, d.zip AS zip, d.addr1 AS addr1, d.addr2 AS addr2, d.memo AS memo, d.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus
FROM orders o
INNER JOIN order_item oi ON o.order_no = oi.order_no
INNER JOIN seller_profile sp ON oi.seller_no = sp.seller_no
LEFT JOIN delivery d ON oi.delivery_no = d.delivery_no
WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}
ORDER BY oi.order_item_no

SELECT sp.seller_no AS sellerNo, sp.company_name AS companyName, sp.ceo_name AS ceo, sp.biz_no AS bizRegNo, sp.tel AS hp, sp.fax AS fax, m.email AS email, sp.zip AS zip, sp.addr1 AS addr1, sp.addr2 AS addr2, sp.status AS grade FROM seller_profile sp JOIN member m ON sp.member_no = m.member_no WHERE sp.seller_no = #{sellerNo}

SELECT point_no AS pointNo, member_no AS memberNo, order_no AS orderNo, point_type AS pointType, point_value AS pointValue, balance_point AS balancePoint, reason, expire_date AS expireDate, reg_date AS regDate FROM member_point WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT 5

SELECT point_no AS pointNo, member_no AS memberNo, order_no AS orderNo, point_type AS pointType, point_value AS pointValue, balance_point AS balancePoint, reason, expire_date AS expireDate, reg_date AS regDate FROM member_point WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} ORDER BY reg_date DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}

SELECT r.review_no AS reviewNo, r.rating, r.content, r.reg_date AS regDate, oi.product_name AS productName, oi.product_image AS imagePath FROM product_review r INNER JOIN order_item oi ON r.order_item_no = oi.order_item_no WHERE r.member_no = #{memberNo} ORDER BY r.reg_date DESC

SELECT q.qna_no AS qnaNo, c.cate_name AS cateName, p.cate_name AS parentCateName, q.title AS title, q.status AS status, q.reg_date AS regDate, q.answer_date AS answerDate
FROM qna q
JOIN cs_category c ON q.cs_cate_no = c.cs_cate_no
JOIN cs_category p ON c.parent_no = p.cs_cate_no
WHERE q.member_no = #{memberNo}
ORDER BY q.reg_date DESC

SELECT q.qna_no AS qnaNo, c.cate_name AS cateName, p.cate_name AS parentCateName, q.title AS title, q.status AS status, q.reg_date AS regDate, q.answer_date AS answerDate
FROM qna q
JOIN cs_category c ON q.cs_cate_no = c.cs_cate_no
JOIN cs_category p ON c.parent_no = p.cs_cate_no
WHERE q.member_no = #{memberNo}
ORDER BY q.reg_date DESC
LIMIT #{start}, #{size}
SELECT c.cs_cate_no AS csCateNo, c.cate_name AS cateName FROM cs_category c INNER JOIN cs_category p ON c.parent_no = p.cs_cate_no WHERE p.cate_name = '상품' ORDER BY c.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qna ( member_no, cs_cate_no, title, content, status ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{csCateNo}, #{title}, #{content}, '검토중' )
mapper.update: UPDATE order_item SET item_status = '구매확정', purchase_confirm_date = NOW() WHERE order_item_no = #{orderItemNo}
mapper.select: SELECT oi.order_item_no AS orderItemNo, oi.product_no AS productNo, oi.product_name AS productName FROM order_item oi WHERE oi.order_item_no = #{orderItemNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_review ( order_item_no, member_no, product_no, rating, content ) VALUES ( #{orderItemNo}, #{memberNo}, #{productNo}, #{rating}, #{content} )
INSERT INTO review_image ( review_no, image_path, sort_order ) VALUES ( #{reviewNo}, #{imagePath}, #{sortOrder} )
